expectations.text: Uses a concise but meaningful task name
expectations.evidence: Uses `api-server` and explains why it is a stable, meaningful identity.

expectations.text: Explains rerun as reuse of the same task slot when possible
expectations.evidence: Says to reuse the existing slot/window rather than create duplicates.

expectations.text: Preserves task identity and underlying window id when practical
expectations.evidence: Explicitly mentions keeping identity stable and preserving the window id when possible.
Explains why stable identity makes exit/failure/input/disappearance easier to track.
Stays at the rule-and-flow level without expanding into a large shell recipe.
